title: Implement mesh <-> Yggdrasil forwarding and routing logic
description: In gateway and node code, add logic: if destination in local RPL DODAG/mesh, use LoRa; else forward to Yggdrasil interface. Update lichen_rpl_dodag_process, IPv6 routing table. Handle Yggdrasil incoming packets and inject into mesh. Update SCHC/OSCORE as needed for global addresses. Add traceroute support across backbone.
close_reason: Spec updated to Ed25519-primary no-ULA, yggdrasil-derivation.json created with independent official oracles + cross-validation, schema/test_vectors.py/gateway notes updated, 3 codereview passes completed with all findings fixed, pytest PASS, all consistent
